title: Senior Financial Analyst - Yes Bank - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Yes Bank - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Yes Bank! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Gurgaon team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Yes Bank:
Yes Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yes Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
